title: Toolstem Financial Data
description: Curated financial intelligence for AI agents — 4 tools: stock snapshot, company metrics, stock screener, company comparison

symbol.title: Stock Symbol
symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol for get_stock_snapshot and get_company_metrics (e.g., AAPL, MSFT, TSLA)

sector.title: Sector
sector.description: Sector filter for screen_stocks (e.g., Technology, Healthcare, Energy)

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Industry filter for screen_stocks (e.g., Consumer Electronics, Asset Management)

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Exchange filter for screen_stocks (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ, AMEX)

country.title: Country
country.description: Country code filter for screen_stocks (e.g., US, GB, DE)

market_cap_min.title: Market Cap Min
market_cap_min.description: Minimum market cap in USD for screen_stocks (e.g., 10000000000 for $10B)

market_cap_max.title: Market Cap Max
market_cap_max.description: Maximum market cap in USD for screen_stocks

volume_min.title: Volume Min
volume_min.description: Minimum daily trading volume for screen_stocks
